---
title: "AMF_cross_compare"
author: "Celeste Basken"
date: "2026-03-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
```

## Load data

```{r}
# Combined data
combined <- read.csv("NPP_AMF_combined.csv")

combined <- combined %>%
  mutate(
    Inoculation = factor(Inoculation),
    Polyculture = factor(Polyculture),
    Group = interaction(Inoculation, Polyculture, sep = "_")
  )

```

```{r}
# AMF

combined <- combined %>%
  mutate(
    Polyculture = factor(Polyculture),
    Inoculation = factor(Inoculation)
  )

ggplot(combined,
       aes(x = arb_vesc_colonization,
           y = percent_ANPP,
           color = Inoculation)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  facet_grid(Polyculture ~ Water_gal_per_plant_wk) +
  labs(
    title = "AMF Colonization vs Percent ANPP",
    subtitle = "Faceted by Intercropping and Water",
    x = "Arbuscular/Vesicular Colonization (%)",
    y = "Percent ANPP (%)",
    color = "Inoculation"
  )

```
